item.title: v1.83.0723
item.description:
本次更新（1.83.0723）：
- 修复小组件「本月流量」统计异常偏大的问题：流量现在跨应用启动持续准确累计（包含应用未打开期间产生的流量）。
- 升级后首次启动会把本月流量计数清零一次并重新开始累计，仅此一次。
- 完整变化可在 设置 → 关于 → 更新记录 中查看。

This update (1.83.0723):
- Fixed the widget's This Month traffic over-counting: totals now accumulate accurately across app launches (including traffic that moved while the app was closed).
- The first launch after this update resets the month's counter once, after which counting starts fresh — one time only.
- Full history is available under Settings → About → Changelog.

更新会重启应用，当前连接会短暂断开，更新完成后重新连接即可。
Updating restarts the app; the current connection drops briefly — reconnect after the update finishes.

item.title: v1.53.0720
item.description:
本次更新（1.53.0720）汇总了距上次更新以来的全部新增：

修复
- 修复部分网络环境下全新安装时提示「已损坏」、需手动执行命令才能打开的问题；安装包现已随包自带公证票据，装完即用。

新增
- 更新记录：在 设置 → 关于 中查看每个版本的更新内容与变化历史；有新版本时先看更新内容再决定升级。
- 网络工具箱：连通性 / DNS 查询 / CDN 探测。
- HTTPS 抓包与改写：本机解密、查看并按规则改写请求与响应。
- 网络自动化：按 Wi-Fi 网络或网络条件自动切换规则，支持强制门户检测。
- 翻译：划词（⇧⌘T）、语音（⇧⌘V）、视频（系统声音）翻译，均在本机运行。
- 截图标注：区域 / 窗口截图的标注编辑器，含拼图、OCR、录屏。
- 跨设备局域网共享：配对码升级为 128 位密钥，文件传输进度 / 取消 / 批量操作。

改进
- 规则集改为按需在线下载并本地加载，页面显示各自的更新时间与来源。
- 规则数据的「刚更新」标记改为仅在更新后短暂显示，随后自动隐藏。
- 证书管理与信任设置、小组件跨端修复与自愈。

隐私
- 新增可关闭的匿名安装统计：仅随机安装 ID、版本号、平台三项，默认开启，可在 设置 → 关于 随时关闭。所有功能均在本机运行。
---
This update (1.53.0720) rolls up everything new since your last update:

Fixed
- Fixed a fresh-install "app is damaged" error on some networks that required a manual command to open; the build now carries its notarization ticket, so it just works after install.

New
- Changelog: see what each version changed in Settings → About; when an update is available, read its notes before choosing to upgrade.
- Network toolbox: reachability, DNS lookup, and CDN probe.
- HTTPS inspect & rewrite: decrypt, inspect, and rewrite requests and responses locally by rule.
- Network automation: switch rules by Wi-Fi network or network condition, with captive-portal detection.
- Translation: select-text (⇧⌘T), voice (⇧⌘V), and video (system audio), all on-device.
- Screenshot annotation: an editor for region/window captures, with collage, OCR, and screen recording.
- Cross-device LAN sharing: pairing code upgraded to a 128-bit secret; transfer progress, cancel, and batch actions.

Improved
- Rule sets are now downloaded on demand and loaded locally, each showing its own update time and source.
- The rule-data "just updated" flag now shows briefly right after a refresh and then hides on its own.
- Certificate management and trust settings; cross-platform widget fixes and self-healing.

Privacy
- New optional anonymous install statistics: just a random install ID, version, and platform — on by default, switchable off any time in Settings → About. Everything runs on your device.

更新会重启应用，当前连接会短暂断开，更新完成后重新连接即可。
Updating restarts the app; the current connection drops briefly — reconnect after the update finishes.

item.title: v1.53.0720
item.description:
本次更新（1.53.0720）汇总了距上次更新以来的全部新增：

新增
- 更新记录：在 设置 → 关于 中查看每个版本的更新内容与变化历史；有新版本时先看更新内容再决定升级。
- 网络工具箱：连通性 / DNS 查询 / CDN 探测。
- HTTPS 抓包与改写：本机解密、查看并按规则改写请求与响应。
- 网络自动化：按 Wi-Fi 网络或网络条件自动切换规则，支持强制门户检测。
- 翻译：划词（⇧⌘T）、语音（⇧⌘V）、视频（系统声音）翻译，均在本机运行。
- 截图标注：区域 / 窗口截图的标注编辑器，含拼图、OCR、录屏。
- 跨设备局域网共享：配对码升级为 128 位密钥，文件传输进度 / 取消 / 批量操作。

改进
- 规则集改为按需在线下载并本地加载，页面显示各自的更新时间与来源。
- 规则数据的「刚更新」标记改为仅在更新后短暂显示，随后自动隐藏。
- 证书管理与信任设置、小组件跨端修复与自愈。

隐私
- 新增可关闭的匿名安装统计：仅随机安装 ID、版本号、平台三项，默认开启，可在 设置 → 关于 随时关闭。所有功能均在本机运行。
---
This update (1.53.0720) rolls up everything new since your last update:

New
- Changelog: see what each version changed in Settings → About; when an update is available, read its notes before choosing to upgrade.
- Network toolbox: reachability, DNS lookup, and CDN probe.
- HTTPS inspect & rewrite: decrypt, inspect, and rewrite requests and responses locally by rule.
- Network automation: switch rules by Wi-Fi network or network condition, with captive-portal detection.
- Translation: select-text (⇧⌘T), voice (⇧⌘V), and video (system audio), all on-device.
- Screenshot annotation: an editor for region/window captures, with collage, OCR, and screen recording.
- Cross-device LAN sharing: pairing code upgraded to a 128-bit secret; transfer progress, cancel, and batch actions.

Improved
- Rule sets are now downloaded on demand and loaded locally, each showing its own update time and source.
- The rule-data "just updated" flag now shows briefly right after a refresh and then hides on its own.
- Certificate management and trust settings; cross-platform widget fixes and self-healing.

Privacy
- New optional anonymous install statistics: just a random install ID, version, and platform — on by default, switchable off any time in Settings → About. Everything runs on your device.

更新会重启应用，当前连接会短暂断开，更新完成后重新连接即可。
Updating restarts the app; the current connection drops briefly — reconnect after the update finishes.

item.title: v1.05.0711
item.description:
新增应用内自动更新：应用会自动检查新版本，也可在 设置 → 关于 → 检查更新 手动检查；确认后自动下载安装。
小组件与出口检测的跨端改进：返回前台时自动校准连接状态与网络出口显示。

New in-app auto-update: the app checks for new versions automatically, or manually via Settings → About → Check for updates; confirm to download and install.
Cross-platform widget and egress-console improvements: connection state and exit readings re-sync when returning to the foreground.

更新会重启应用，当前连接会短暂断开，更新完成后重新连接即可。
Updating restarts the app; the current connection drops briefly — reconnect after the update finishes.

小组件与出口检测的跨端改进：返回前台时自动校准连接状态与网络出口显示。

New in-app auto-update: the app checks for new versions automatically, or manually via Settings → About → Check for updates; confirm to download and install.
Cross-platform widget and egress-console improvements: connection state and exit readings re-sync when returning to the foreground.

更新会重启应用，当前连接会短暂断开，更新完成后重新连接即可。

小组件与出口检测的跨端改进：返回前台时自动校准连接状态与网络出口显示。

New in-app auto-update: the app checks for new versions automatically, or manually via Settings → About → Check for updates; confirm to download and install.
Cross-platform widget and egress-console improvements: connection state and exit readings re-sync when returning to the foreground.

item.description:
新增应用内自动更新：应用会自动检查新版本，也可在 设置 → 关于 → 检查更新 手动检查；确认后自动下载安装。
小组件与出口检测的跨端改进：返回前台时自动校准连接状态与网络出口显示。

New in-app auto-update: the app checks for new versions automatically, or manually via Settings → About → Check for updates; confirm to download and install.
Cross-platform widget and egress-console improvements: connection state and exit readings re-sync when returning to the foreground.

更新会重启应用，当前连接会短暂断开，更新完成后重新连接即可。
